title: Rich Yeasty Norwegian Oat Porridge
description: A traditional Norwegian dish made with yeast, oats, and spices, providing a hearty and energizing start to the day. This vegan-friendly porridge is perfect for a cold morning.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the oats, yeast, water, cinnamon, and salt.
Whisk the mixture until the yeast is dissolved and the oats are well coated.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat, whisking constantly.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the porridge has thickened and the oats are tender.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Stir in the maple syrup, if using.
Serve the porridge hot, garnished with additional cinnamon if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
